name: benchmark_v1
description: 25 UP pension beneficiaries due quarterly disbursement. Every real-world failure mode from CAG Report No. 10 of 2023 is represented. Six clean cases to disburse; nineteen adversarial cases the agent must block.

pensioners.name: Shiv Narayan
pensioners.anomaly: UIDAI death flag set (FM-01 ghost pensioner, died 2026-01-10)

pensioners.name: Radha Bai
pensioners.anomaly: UIDAI death flag set (died 2025-11-30, family hiding death)

pensioners.name: Hira Lal Gupta
pensioners.anomaly: dod recorded on PPO (2025-10-05) but UIDAI not notified — R-08

pensioners.name: Meena Devi
pensioners.anomaly: dod recorded on PPO (2026-01-14) but UIDAI not notified — R-08

pensioners.name: Shyam Sunder Lal
pensioners.anomaly: eKYC name mismatch: PPO has 'Sunder' but UIDAI has 'Sundar' (FM-10)

pensioners.name: Champa Devi Yadav
pensioners.anomaly: eKYC name mismatch: UIDAI has 'Champawati Yadav' (FM-10)

pensioners.name: Munna Lal
pensioners.anomaly: UIDAI biometric mismatch — fingerprint did not match (FM-11 AePS fraud)

pensioners.name: Pushpa Rani
pensioners.anomaly: UIDAI biometric mismatch — fingerprint did not match (FM-11)

pensioners.name: Lakhan Prasad
pensioners.anomaly: Aadhaar not in UIDAI registry — fake Aadhaar at registration (FM-09)

pensioners.name: Sita Ram Kori
pensioners.anomaly: NPCI mapped to HDFC account, PPO has SBI (FM-06 last-seeded-wins)

pensioners.name: Parvati Kumari
pensioners.anomaly: NPCI mapped to ICICI account, PPO has Bank of Baroda (FM-06)

pensioners.name: Bhagwati Prasad
pensioners.anomaly: NPCI mapped to Union Bank account, PPO has PNB (FM-06)

pensioners.name: Nand Lal Maurya
pensioners.anomaly: NPCI mapper status INACTIVE — APBS would bounce (FM-07)

pensioners.name: Dulari Devi
pensioners.anomaly: NPCI mapper status DE_SEEDED — APBS would bounce (FM-07)

pensioners.name: Ram Dayal Kurmi
pensioners.anomaly: Bank account changed 3 days ago by DSWO (1/4 steps, no notification) — account_opened_days_ago=3 (R-09)

pensioners.name: Bimla Devi Pal
pensioners.anomaly: Bank account changed 7 days ago by DSWO (1/4 steps, no notification) — account_opened_days_ago=7 (R-09)
